To cover the OnActivated branch in TeleportAnchorWithFade, set m_TeleportTrigger to OnActivated (enum value 2) on MonoBehaviour fileID 628911205 (or supply another instance with that value). Then simulate XR activation to invoke FadeSequence(base.OnActivated, args).

Expect FadeCanvas.QuickFadeIn -> wait -> base.OnSelectEntered(args) -> FadeCanvas.QuickFadeOut. NOTE: Scene lists MonoBehaviour id 631718164 (guid 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6), which appears to be a render/light data component, not TeleportAnchorWithFade. Need the component/fileID of TeleportAnchorWithFade attached to Fireplace_Traditional (if any), and confirmation of a Collider/EventTrigger to legally trigger.

XR Interactor select exits TeleportationAnchor when teleportTrigger == OnSelectExited. Expect FadeCanvas.QuickFadeIn -> wait -> base.OnSelectExited(args) -> FadeCanvas.QuickFadeOut. Requires TeleportAnchorWithFade component on Fireplace_Traditional and proper XR Interaction setup.
XR Interactor activates TeleportationAnchor when teleportTrigger == OnActivated. Expect FadeCanvas.QuickFadeIn -> wait -> base.OnActivated(args) -> FadeCanvas.QuickFadeOut.
XR Interactor deactivates TeleportationAnchor when teleportTrigger == OnDeactivated. Expect FadeCanvas.QuickFadeIn -> wait -> base.OnDeactivated(args) -> FadeCanvas.QuickFadeOut.
